title: Fast-Growing Nation
roles: Premier, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Everyone relies on you for cheap labor, manufacturing, and industry [represented by Red tokens]. Growth at all costs has quickly made you one of the greatest world powers. Your un-manageable many peoples, through many struggles, have come out of poverty, but to take your place as the central nation sacrifices must be made.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status if you successfully conquer a neighbor (Invade, defeat their Standing Army, and reach their Capital Hex). -1 Status Penalty for initiating war does not apply unless you fail.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +2 Status If Rich Nation (U.S.A) ever retreats a Standing Military from international waters.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status for each Nation you convince to adopt a new currency that you Innovate (costs White Tokens).
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status each time you Innovate a technology (costs White tokens) that competes with another Nation's Innovation.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Fast-Growing Nation has 12 green tokens, 10 red tokens, 3, black tokens, 3 blue tokens

title: Rich Nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Your currency is the international standard which gives you unhindered trade. The only thing holding you back from taking over the world is your ideals and crippling inernal politics. You are rich, but will you remain so? You may use your influence to police the nations and keep the world at peace, but at what cost?
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status the first time you place a Standing Military beyond your borders (Costs 1 Black & 1 Green).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status every other round that you keep a Standing Military outside your borders (costs 2 Green & 2 Black).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status the first time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) solves an international problem.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Rich Nation has 12 green tokens, 10 white tokens, 3, blue tokens, 3 black tokens

title: Strong Nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Able to endure long winters your nation held out longer than anyone else against rule by monarchs, Napoleon, Hitler, and as an oil dependent economy--last to adopt sustainable energy. The tension in this game hangs on your will to war. Your goal is simple. Invade at least one nation, but before you do, see if they'll pay you not to.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you Invade a Nation. -1 Status penalty for Invasions does not apply to you for the entire game.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status for each additional Engage Action.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status if you delay adapting a new Technology by 1 round (game day) that 3 other Nations have adopted.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Strong Nation has 9 blue tokens, 10 green tokens, 3, , 3 black tokens

title: Cloud Nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Though smaller, with less natural resources, and vulnerable to attack from many neighbors, you have one resource in abundance--your people's will to do good. Show the world how quickly a conservative education in both Confuscian and Christian ethics can bring poverty stricken nations into top tier technological progress.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time two or more nations contribute Tokens to or collaborate with your Action on the same round (game day).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status when you mass produce (costs Red Tokens) your own Innovation.
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status each time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) is mass produced (costs Red) and purchased/adopted by another nation.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Cloud Nation has 9 white tokens, 6 green tokens, 3, black tokens,

title: Tech Nation
roles: Prime Minister, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: A former world power, your military force invaded and formerly occupied most of Asia. You upset a lot of neighbors and were humbled by the Rich Nation (U.S.A). It's been decades since you came out with a world changing technology, so see if you can keep your technological lead over rising competition through top tier innovation.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell an Innovation to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status for each of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) that you or another Nation mass produces (costs Red Tokens).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Tech Nation has 9 blue tokens, 6 green tokens, 3, ,

title: Control
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: You are game master and adjudicator. Your job is to know the rules or make them up, explain them to the players, and then adjudicate them fairly. You will also have the opportunity to roleplay as every non-playable entity in the game including other nations, the citizenry of any nation (maybe you decide a player's use of military to suppress protests triggers a revolution and/or a military coup). Pressure players to make high-stakes high-risk decisions with limited intel. Request players gather Tokens or signatures from other players or win votes to achieve their objectives.
Secret_Objective_1: Refer to the back of Action Reports for ways to adjudicate.PPPUse the Fate Deck or any dice system you like to simulate the odds of success.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Control has 0 ,  , , ,

title: Smart Nation
roles: Prime Minister, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Your navy colonized the world bringing enlightenment to its darkest corners, and in the process managed to extract a lot of resources. To make amends like a true gentleman, use your world-leading universities to develop new sustainable energy technology, and unite the world before it falls into the hands of irresponsible capitalists.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell an Innovation to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status the first time you can Build (costs Red tokens) and/or Innovate (costs White Tokens) for 3 consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status when you mass produce (costs Red Tokens) your own Innovation.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Smart Nation has 10 white tokens, 6 green tokens, 3, blue tokens,

title: Engineering Nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: You nearly defeated the entire world. Twice. But now you use your power to unite Europe. Be wary of Strong Nation (Russia), who shares a warlike past, but hasn't learned from their mistakes like you. Stubborn and hungry for power, they are likely to start a war with your neighbors.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status every other turn that you have more Green Tokens than two European Nations, or more than either Rich Nation (U.S.A.) or Strong Nation (Russia).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you place a Standing Military beyond your borders (Costs 1 Black & 1 Green).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status the first time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) solves an international problem.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Engineering Nation has 9 green tokens, 6 blue tokens, 3, white tokens,

title: New Nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Despite being the newest nation, you have the longest history. After throwing you out of Fast-Growing Nation (China) and taking your seat at the U.N., those Communists continue to threaten you with invasion and veto your re-entry into the U.N.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status if Fast-Growing Nation (China), Rich Nation (U.S.A.), and one additional nation sign an Action Report granting New Nation (Taiwan) re-entry into the U.N.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) is mass produced (costs Red) and purchased/adopted by another nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time two or more nations contribute Tokens to or collaborate with your Action on the same round (game day).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: New Nation has 10 white tokens, 6 green tokens, 3, blue tokens,

title: Nieve Real
roles: El Jefe (Boss), Head of Security, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: No virus, gangster, war mongerer, or demogogue is as threatening as your cartel kingdom. Fold your Action Reports in half to signal to the Facilitator when you want your Actions to be kept clandestine. Feel free to steal, develop, or sell a black market alternative to any other Nation's innovations. Everyone deserves a little happiness, even the poor.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status for each successful secret Engage Action (steal, spy, sabotage) against another Nation.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time you spend Tokens to fund Engage Actions of other Nations.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you extort money from a Nation by threatening to publicize an Action Report they secretly signed.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Nieve Real has 10 green tokens, 6 , 3, blue tokens,

title: Global Corporation
roles: C.E.O., C.F.O., & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: In an age of peace being an arms dealer, while still very lucrative, is not good for the brand. With so many new technologies emerging, perhaps you could take the lead in the hot new trend--sustainable energy. In this winner-take-all market, you'll have to create the tech, mass produce it, and be first to market. But it's only profitable if you can get nearly every nation to buy it.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you sell a mass produced (costs Red Tokens) Innovation (costs White Tokens) to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status if you are the first to successfully Innovate (costs White Tokens) Sustainable Energy.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Global Corporation has 10 green tokens, 6 blue tokens, 3, ,

title: Peaceful Nation
roles: Prime Minister, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Of all the nations you are the one who has fought the least. Everyone thinks you are passive, but you could prove them wrong. You are also far closer to Strong Nation (Russia) than most realize. When they start the next war, who will oppose them? There's no advantage like the element of surprise.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status at end of Round 3 (game day 3) if no one has started a war.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +2 Status if you are the first to purchase sustainable energy (costs White to Innovate) mass produced (costs Red) by another Nation.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Peaceful Nation has 9 white tokens, 6 green tokens, 3, black tokens,

title: Developing Nation
roles: President for Life, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: With the largest untapped natural resources of any continent, see if you can extract the wealth in coal, oil, gas, and diamonds by getting other nations to help you build some basic infrastructure. Try to make headlines for anything but corruption, civil wars, or disease.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status each time you can successfully Build (costs Red tokens) two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Earn 1 Green Token for every round (game day) your Status remains below the red X.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you extort money from a Nation by threatening to publicize an Action Report they secretly signed.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Developing Nation has 7 black tokens, 6 blue tokens, 3, ,

title: Oil Rich Nation
roles: King, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Your old enemy, Religious Nation (Israel), and Fast-Growing Nation (China), have just laid claim to your holy site, marked on the map by the dark orange hex with the green tree. Caught between their threats and the cries of Jihad from ultra-conservative factions within your nation, your Nation is on brink of civil war. On top of that, your fossil fuels (Black Tokens) could lose all of their value if anyone achieves sustainable energy.
Secret_Objective_1: Oil Rich Nation (The Arab States) is to lose 2 Status the first time a neighboring nation wins a Green Token from the disputed dark orange hex with the green tree symbol.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you make a speech advocating against the replacement of Fossil Fuels (devalues Black Tokens) with Sustainable Energy.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status if you delay adapting a new Technology by 1 round (game day) that 3 other Nations have adopted.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Oil Rich Nation has 10 black tokens, 6 , 3, blue tokens,

title: Religious Nation
roles: Prime Minister, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Engineering Nation (Germany) & Strong Nation (Russia) tried to annihilate you in WWII after two millennia of persecution. But even now, the home you have reclaimed is under threat from the Oil Rich Nation (Arab States). They may have built a mosque on your capital, but that does not give them or Fast-growing Nation (China) the right to the riches buried beneath it.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status if Oil Rich Nation (the Arab States) and Fast-growing Nation (China) signs an Action Report granting Religious Nation (Israel) soverignty over the disputed dark orange hex with the green tree symbol.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Religious Nation has 10 blue tokens, 6 green tokens, 5, white tokens,

title: Shadow Nation
roles: Eternal Supreme Leader, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Restore Korea to its full glory by finally invading Cloud Nation (South Korea) or boast loudly, threaten, steal, kill, destroy or whatever you have to do to get your soldier population some money, food, and resources of any kind.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you invade Cloud Nation (South Korea). The Penalty for war does not apply.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status for every 2 Green Tokens you can extort from other Nations (perhaps by threatening to invade Cloud Nation)
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you succeed in any Build (costs Red) Action.

title: Penultimate Defense Systems
roles: C.E.O., C.F.O., & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Penultimate Defense Systems sells, "The Ultimate Last Resort." Find out who fears who, instigate an arms race and a bidding war for your newest tech, equip aggressors and their opponents. If the leaders won't buy, then equip their citizens against their oppressive regime. There's always a win when there's a fight.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you sell a mass produced (costs Red Tokens) Innovation (costs White Tokens) to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell/trade a Weapons Tech you Innovated (costs White Tokens) to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status on the first turn that you Innovate and Global Corporation does not.

title: Ice nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Though a very peaceful nation, learning to live in the extremities has made you very tough and extremely resourceful. Irreversible damage to the ozone and continued use of fossil fuels is now ruining fisheries, melting your glaciers, and flooding coastal economies. It's not too late to Innovate and reverse this trend.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time two or more nations contribute Tokens to or collaborate with your Action on the same round (game day).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status when you mass produce (costs Red Tokens) your own Innovation.
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status each time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) is mass produced (costs Red) and purchased/adopted by another nation.

brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Imagine a bunch of prisoners exiled from one of the smartest nations and left to form their own society among one of the toughest continents inhabited by one of the oldest indigenous populations on earth. Welcome to Wild Nation.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status the first time you can Innovate (costs White Tokens) for two consecutive rounds (game days).
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell an Innovation to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status the first time you can Build (costs Red tokens) and/or Innovate (costs White Tokens) for 3 consecutive rounds (game days).

title: Spice nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Largest democracy in the world, the source of two world religions, and the fastest growing labor market of engineers and techies--Spice Nation wants the same first-world lifestyle of the Smart Nations it defied. Show the world that you truly are abolishing the caste system by doing more for more with less for less.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status each time you Innovate a technology (costs White tokens) that competes with another Nation's Innovation.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time one of your Innovations (costs White Tokens) is mass produced (costs Red) and purchased/adopted by another nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell more cheaply or freely give an Innovation (costs White Tokens to Innovate) that competes with another Nation's Innovation.
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell more cheaply or freely give an Innovation (costs White Tokens to Innovate) that competes with another Nation's Innovation.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Spice nation has 10 red tokens, 9 white tokens, 3, black tokens,

title: Beautiful nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Adjudicator
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Once the greatest empire to ever rule and home to the grandest international religion, Beautiful nation is now home to the greatest collection of historical sites, art, food, museums, cathedrals, high end cars, fashion, wines, and cheeses. The problem is economic corruption--almost no one pays taxes, making it difficult for the state to compete with the mafia or the church.
Secret_Objective_1: Earn 1 Green Token for every round (game day) your Status remains below the red X.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you sell an Innovation to another Nation.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you use the Build Action (costs Red Tokens) to introduce new brands/products/business
Secret_Objective_5: Blame the Germans. If Engineering Nation refuses to trade, you may force them to draw a Crisis card every other round (game day).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Beautiful nation has 10 white tokens, 6 green tokens, , ,

title: Old nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Adjudicator
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Most of Europe claims to have once ruled the rest, but the Greeks were first and most original. But now you have the most debt, the most unemployment, and the most rules. If not tied to the Euro, you would simply print more money, weaken your currency, and thus make your exports appear cheaper and much more marketable. Young people have no jobs, entrepreneurs can't start new businesses, and your banks aren't lending money. It's time to leave the Euro.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status each time you succeed in any Build (costs Red) Action.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time two or more nations contribute Tokens to or collaborate with your Action on the same round (game day).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status after you discuss with Fast-growing Nation about possibly adopting a new currency.
Secret_Objective_5: Blame the E.U. If any European team refuses to trade, you may force them to draw a Crisis card every other round (game day).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Old nation has 6 red tokens, 6 black tokens, , ,

title: Finance nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Your strong reputation as the perfect union between socialism and capitalism among the international banking community is being threatened by corrupt world leaders who launder their dirty money though your clean banks. The European Union now trades using one currency, the Euro, which binds each nation to the same rules. If only you could get the southern economies to play by those rules, collect taxes, pay their debts, and stop begging for E.U. bailouts.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status as soon as all European teams are above the Red X on the Status Tracker.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you purchase or Innovate (costs White Tokens) any Weapons Tech to defend against Strong Nation (Russia).
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you discover and expose any illegal, secret, or black market Actions by other Teams.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Finance nation has 9 green tokens, 6 white tokens, 3, blue tokens,

title: Interpol
roles: Secretary-General, Chief Prosecutor, & Adjudicator
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: You are the International Police Force and Judge within the game. Find evidence (written Action Reports) of and prosecute Actions (stage a trial) that violate the world's social contract. Suggest a penalty if you convict. Control Team Referees can step in to roleplay as any entity unrepresented by another player.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +2 Status as soon as all European teams are above the Red X on the Status Tracker.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +2 the first time you conduct a trial of peers to prosecute an illegal Action
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Interpol has 6 blue tokens, 6 white tokens, 3, green tokens,

title: Red Net Anonymous
roles: Boss, Head of Security
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Crime, corruption, and the black market for your illegal internet security services are thriving in Russia's "democracy" under the great leader. The oligarchs who bought up the Soviet state-owned industry are scared to cross him, but after fumbling the invasion of Ukraine, incurring the wrath of international sanctions, and a few too many state-sponsored poisonings, the people need revolution.
Secret_Objective_1: Gain +1 Status for each successful secret Engage Action (steal, spy, sabotage) against another Nation.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status each time you spend Tokens to fund Engage Actions of other Nations.
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status each time you extort money from a Nation by threatening to publicize an Action Report they secretly signed.
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +1 Status each time Strong Nation (Russia) gets blamed for one of your Actions.
Secret_Objective_6: Earn 1 Green Token each round (Game Day) that Strong Nation remains at or below the Red X on the Status Tracker.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Red Net Anonymous has 10 green tokens, 9 , 3, blue tokens,

title: Pope
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: In a world of untrusted politicians, a trustworthy apolitical leader carries a lot of weight. Empires have come and gone, but the church has endured for 2000 years. That adds up to a lot of tithes, ancient assets, and traditional power rarely entrusted to so few. Be careful who you are seen with. One wrong move and your role as an unbiased moral authority could vanish. This role requires serious roleplay. We suggest wearing at least a toga or a priest collar) and referring to yourself in the third person.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Pope has 10 white tokens, 6 green tokens, , ,

title: End Time Prophet
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Born into abject poverty, in the remote mountains of Cloud Nation (South Korea) during the nation's most troubling times, your character was forged through starvation, desperation, perseverance, and asceticism. Educated just enough to read and write, you learned to commune with the Heavens during long periods of fasting prayer. Your prayers carry real consequences. Report the sins of the nations to the Control Team and watch God's judgment unfold (targeted Crisis Card Events).
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: End Time Prophet has 6 white tokens,  , , ,

title: Contingency Planner
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: WARNING: DO NOT READ ANY FURTHER UNLESS YOU ARE THE ONLY ONE PLAYING THIS ROLE. This is your mission should you choose to accept it. You play Devil's advocate, keep tension in the game, and make world peace a little more challenging, which justifies any means to that end. Unite the world against a common enemy and usher in the new world order. Maintain your role on another team as cover.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Contingency Planner has 6 blue tokens,  , , ,

title: G.N.N.
roles: Chief Editor, Journalist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: There is too much happening too fast among too many people, even in this little world, so who has time to question your version of the story? Everyone depends on your publication to know what's going on. In a world flooded with capital and information, he who controls the narrative is king.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: G.N.N. has 6 white tokens,  , , ,

title: A Sassy Nation
roles: Secretary of Defense, Chief Scientist, & Adjudicator
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Otto von Bismark prophesied before WW1 that it would be, "Some damn foolish thing in the Balkans," that would bring the world to war. You have the unique ability to assassinate players. Privately keep written contracts (Action Reports). Carry out executions by fake shank, water gun, nerf gun, or tennis-ball-in-a-sock grenade your target. If the bullet lands, draw a Fate card to see if the player survives, or is assigned a new role in the game (killed). Feel free to spread rumors, blackmail, extort security payments, or play sides off one another.

title: Ice nation
roles: President, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Though a very peaceful nation, learning to live in the extremities has made you very tough and extremely resourceful. Irreversible damage to the ozone and continued use of fossil fuels is now ruining fisheries, melting your glaciers, and flooding coastal economies. It's not too late to Innovate and reverse this trend.
Secret_Objective_1: UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES ARE YOU TO SHOW THIS CARD TO ANYONE OUTSIDE YOUR TEAM.PPPThe Slegnah FactionPPPYour sensitivity to nature has brought you into communication with the Slegnah, the entities who watch over and protect the earth from your mutual enemy, the Snahmehd. The enemy faction rebelled and lost more than 6,000 years ago. Now the rebels are wreaking pychological havoc on humans out of spite. Your objective is to win each of the nation-teams over to your side (wear your blue pin) as you reveal the truth. PPPSeraphimPPPIce Nation serves as the messenger side of the organization, but your administrative division is known as the Seraphim. They observe and track humanity's movements and ecosystems from mostly invisible structures. Without their management the earth would be unlivable. Together you hope to keep humanity from going extinct long enough to develop their spiritual maturity.

title: Wild nation
roles: Prime Minister, Secretary of Defense, & Chief Scientist
brief_explanation_of_teams_history: Imagine a bunch of prisoners exiled from one of the smartest nations and left to form their own society among one of the toughest continents inhabited by one of the oldest indigenous populations on earth. Welcome to Wild Nation.
Secret_Objective_1: UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES ARE YOU TO REVEAL THIS INTEL TO ANYONE OUTSIDE YOUR TEAM.PPPThe Snahmed FactionPPPDuring the ancient rebellion, before recorded history, your ancestors joined Leicul's side and won your liberty from the strict authoritarian rule of Hewhay, leader of your rivals, the Slegnah. But your faction, the Snahmed, is outnumbered 3 to 1 so you must gear up for another war.PPPDespite having lost all but the mythological accounts of this history, humanity still shares your distrust of authoritarian rule. They value freedom, liberalism, independence, equality, and self-reliance. Your objective is to gain their allegiance (wear your red pins) as you reveal the truth. PPPTake Back the Skies from the Slegnah FactionPPPYour opponents observe and control the ecosystem through mostly invisible structures in the sky.
Secret_Objective_2: Gain +1 Status the first time you Innovate (costs White Tokens) to observe and track U.A.P.s (Unidentified Aerial Phenomena)
Secret_Objective_4: Gain +1 Status when you Innovate (costs White Tokens) to remove Slegnah control of these structures.
Secret_Objective_5: Gain +2 Status at the end of the game if more players wearing a red Snahmehd pin outnumber those wearing a blue Slegnah pin.
how_many_tokens_nation_starts_with: Wild nation has 6 red tokens, 6 blue tokens, 3, white tokens,
